evals.prompt: I want to understand my spending habits. Can you break down where my money has been going over the last 3 months? My YNAB token is peTMQ-rKFhIpHB_mLl0oLFnvf_BG3sEDOoGeo4XlELc and budget ID is 09aeeb2f-203b-4341-840b-68e0251efae9

evals.prompt: How much have I been spending on groceries recently? Show me the trend over the last 6 months. My YNAB info: token peTMQ-rKFhIpHB_mLl0oLFnvf_BG3sEDOoGeo4XlELc, budget 09aeeb2f-203b-4341-840b-68e0251efae9
evals.expected_output: Month-by-month grocery spending trend, with specific amounts and transaction counts per month

evals.prompt: Give me a full picture of my financial health - net worth, income vs expenses, and which budget categories are problematic. YNAB token: peTMQ-rKFhIpHB_mLl0oLFnvf_BG3sEDOoGeo4XlELc, budget: 09aeeb2f-203b-4341-840b-68e0251efae9
